# excel-formula-explainer

> **Daily Build** | 2026-07-14

## Description
Paste an Excel formula and get a plain-English explanation via OpenAI

## Stack
Python, openai, tkinter

## Setup
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
```
